name: Pongsit Kamphee
description: '''Pongsit "Pu" Kampee'''  ({{langx|th|พงษ์สิทธิ์ คำภีร์}}) is a [[Thai rock]] singer and producer popular in the [[Phleng phuea chiwit|pleng phuea chiwit]] (Songs for Life) genre. Inspired by [[Preecha Chanapai]] of [[Carabao (band)|Carabao]] and Surachai Jantimathawn of [[Caravan (Thai band)|Caravan]].
